California Minimum Wage 2026
Current rate, tipped employee rules, and what to do if you are underpaid in California.
Current minimum wage
$16.50/hr
$20/hr for fast food restaurant employees (AB 1228)
Federal vs state
State rate applies ($16.50/hr)
Last verified
2025
How to use the California rate
California employers should not treat minimum wage as a generic national setting. This page tracks $16.50/hr for California, while Alaska, Arizona, Colorado may impose different amounts or timing. Calif...
